activities.title: 5x Challenge — Set Your Vision
instructions: Discuss capacity limits from Scenes 1–4 — what slows your venture from growing more?
Set a bold 5x challenge: what would 5× impact look like if you break today's limits?
Record your 5x metric and target in the Playbook mission
debriefQuestions: What would 5× impact look like if we break today's limits?

activities.title: Growth Engine Stage Redesign
instructions: Review the 8-stage Growth Engine Canvas with your squad
Pick one stage to own and redesign
Map the current bottleneck, design your new solution, and define expected impact
Complete the four fields in the Playbook mission — brainstorm offline with your squad
debriefQuestions: What's the biggest constraint in your stage — and how will your solution break through it?

activities.title: Squad Present & Connect the Engine
instructions: Each squad presents in 3 minutes: stage chosen, bottleneck, solution, expected impact
Listen for how stages connect — build on each other's ideas
Name how leadership multiplies your engine (Scenes 11–12)
debriefQuestions: How do our pieces work together to create continuous momentum?
If leadership is the multiplier, how many leaders does your engine need?
